title: hoya chinensis
intro: Hoya chinensis, also known as Chinese wax plant, is a species of flowering plant in the milkweed family Apocynaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Hoya chinensis include reducing fever, alleviating cough and asthma symptoms, and treating gastrointestinal issues such as diarrhea and dysentery. The herbal preparations of Hoya chinensis include tea, tincture, and decoction, which are typically used to treat various health conditions in traditional Chinese medicine.
